lists: First item: Auto-update tools to keep your installation fresh
Second item: Over 300 optional plugins including git, docker, kubectl
Third item: Over 140 themes to customize your terminal
Fourth item: Auto-update tool to keep installation up to date
Fifth item: Helper functions and aliases for daily use

Eighth item: Cross-platform support for macOS, Linux, and WSL
First item: robbyrussell is the default clean theme
Second item: agnoster is powerline-style with git info
Third item: powerlevel10k is highly customizable and fast
First item: GitHub Issues for bugs and feature requests
Second item: Discord community chat server
Third item: Wiki for comprehensive documentation
